usageSeeds.name: MDFCommerce
usageSeeds.headline: Multi-application Angular modernization, component-library architecture, and accessibility delivery
usageSeeds.description: Defined and executed the upgrade strategy for three large Angular marketplace applications, completing Angular 8-to-18 modernization in roughly eight months instead of a longer original timeline. Helped architect a shared component library with senior engineers, shipped Storybook-documented components with test coverage, and used AI-assisted workflows to speed up accessibility remediation in legacy surfaces.

usageSeeds.name: Acuity Brands
usageSeeds.headline: Enterprise full stack delivery with platform architecture, CI/CD hardening, and reusable systems
usageSeeds.description: Built and maintained enterprise applications across React, Next.js, Node.js, NestJS, and .NET/C#, contributing to both frontend and backend architecture in a large multi-project environment. Led Bit.dev Harmony adoption for a 65+ component library used across 20+ projects, rolled out Dependabot in Azure DevOps pipelines, strengthened vulnerability management with BlackDuck, Aqua, and Snyk, and kept coverage above 95% while supporting REST and GraphQL-oriented platform work.

usageSeeds.name: OxDreams
usageSeeds.headline: Startup delivery under investor pressure with measurable feed-performance recovery
usageSeeds.description: Improved social feed performance by 40% through SQL optimization, table restructuring, targeted indexes, and load-test-driven bottleneck fixes in a private social network startup. Delivered urgent investor-facing features such as like, share, friend search, and follow flows while also contributing to maintenance work, performance tuning, and junior developer mentoring.

usageSeeds.name: LogicTake / Parachut360
usageSeeds.headline: Freelance delivery for a temporary life-insurance platform with deadline-bound feature work
usageSeeds.description: Maintained and enhanced features for the Parachut360 temporary life-insurance platform in a freelance delivery context with short deadlines. Implemented new interface flows, fixed bugs, and validated data against documented business rules so required functionality could ship on time.

usageSeeds.name: FullSoft
usageSeeds.headline: WMS platform reconstruction with modernization, discovery, and release-readiness work
usageSeeds.description: Rebuilt core features of a WMS platform within 10 months during the pandemic, enabling two months of UAT before release. Introduced React and more modern development practices into an older .NET and ActionScript environment, interviewed clients and internal developers to map requirements, documented modules, ran tests, and generated desktop-style UAT binaries with pkg and Electron.

usageSeeds.name: Saga Sistemas
usageSeeds.headline: ERP-integrated portal delivery with reusable base-project strategy and modernization work
usageSeeds.description: Improved Laravel base-project architecture by better leveraging framework capabilities and by creating a more reusable delivery foundation for customized client portals. Designed a Git branch and tag strategy to unify client-specific versions into a base project, significantly reduced duplicate effort, introduced React for a new frontend base, and supported integrations with PL/SQL-backed modules.

usageSeeds.name: FDD
usageSeeds.headline: Digital transformation delivery across performance debugging, API integration, and MVP execution
usageSeeds.description: Improved application efficiency by identifying bottlenecks and debugging AngularJS components with Chrome DevTools across digital transformation projects. Delivered a commercial MVP in two months with CodeIgniter-based blockchain integrations, while also maintaining features, integrating APIs, troubleshooting production issues, and contributing to frontend and UI improvements in billing and event-oriented systems.

usageSeeds.name: AxysWeb
usageSeeds.headline: Early .NET Core adoption, RESTful API transition, and legacy-platform performance work
usageSeeds.description: Developed a new project model during the early adoption of .NET Core for a gas-station-network client and proposed the architectural transition from monolithic structure to RESTful APIs. Improved third-party integrations and SQL-query performance, maintained legacy systems, delivered new features, and supported analysis, troubleshooting, code review, and Scrum ceremonies across web, portal, and hybrid-app contexts.

groupSeeds.label: Frontend
groupSeeds.description: Interface delivery, component systems, and modern web application foundations.
sourceNotes: Curated from approved frontend framework, styling, and tooling entries in the CSV.

groupSeeds.label: Backend
groupSeeds.description: Application runtime, API delivery, and server-side modernization foundations.
sourceNotes: Language and framework skills are grouped for recruiter-readable backend breadth.

groupSeeds.label: APIs
groupSeeds.description: API styles, integration contracts, and service interface delivery.
sourceNotes: Separated from storage and tooling so API-facing skills can evolve as an independent group.

groupSeeds.label: API Tooling
groupSeeds.description: Documentation, inspection, and validation tooling for integration work.
sourceNotes: Split out from API protocols to keep contract work and supporting tools distinct.

groupSeeds.label: Databases
groupSeeds.description: Persistence platforms, relational modeling, and query-heavy data work.
sourceNotes: Separated from API work so data-platform depth can be expanded independently.

groupSeeds.label: Cloud
groupSeeds.description: Cloud vendor platforms and managed environment experience.
sourceNotes: Cloud platform knowledge is isolated from DevOps runtime and CI/CD workflow tooling.

groupSeeds.label: DevOps
groupSeeds.description: Containerization, orchestration, and operational delivery foundations.
sourceNotes: Runtime and operational skills are kept distinct from cloud vendor and pipeline categories.

groupSeeds.label: CI/CD
groupSeeds.description: Pipeline automation, release workflows, and delivery orchestration tooling.
sourceNotes: Delivery automation is isolated to support future growth without mixing platform concerns.

groupSeeds.label: Testing & Quality
groupSeeds.description: Automated quality practices that support delivery confidence across teams.
sourceNotes: Testing and code-quality practices are grouped to show engineering discipline, not only frameworks.

groupSeeds.label: Tooling
groupSeeds.description: Reusable engineering tooling and architecture support for scalable delivery.
sourceNotes: Engineering tooling is separated from AI-assisted tools so each area can grow with clearer boundaries.

groupSeeds.label: AI-assisted
groupSeeds.description: AI-assisted development tools used to accelerate implementation workflows.
sourceNotes: AI-assisted tooling remains limited to approved source-backed skills with verified public context.

groupSeeds.label: Engineering Behaviors
groupSeeds.description: Delivery habits, collaboration patterns, and engineering behaviors that shape execution quality.
sourceNotes: Behavior-oriented skills are curated from the manually reviewed company-skill matrix supplied on 2026-06-24.
Skill labels and visible experience values are curated from docs/profile/evandro-skills.csv.
Usage cards only show company and project context verified in the repository.
When a skill includes aliases not mapped to a verified public usage card, the interface should show only verified context and note that some mappings remain under review.
Engineering-behavior and expanded company-skill mappings were enriched from the manually reviewed company skill matrix on 2026-06-24.
